shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch watching a task management app materialize from a natural language description on a cream background.
assets.caption: Hatch watching a task management app materialize from a natural language description on a cream background.
assets.prompt: Base44 and the No-Code Bet | hero: Hatch mascot (HackProduct robot with graduation cap and growth arrow) standing in front of a chat interface where someone has typed "build me a task management app for my team." On the right side of the screen, a working web application is materializing out of the description. Cream background. Hatch expression: impressed. No speech bubble. HackProduct wordmark watermark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.

assets.alt: Hatch gesturing at the gap between a person with an idea and a developer who can build it.
assets.caption: Hatch gesturing at the gap between a person with an idea and a developer who can build it.
assets.prompt: Base44 and the No-Code Bet | hatch-narrator: Hatch in narrator pose, standing between two people. On the left: a person with a lightbulb over their head (the idea). On the right: a developer at a keyboard (the traditional path). Between them, a large gap labeled "The gap." Hatch gestures at the gap, suggesting this is the problem to solve. Cream background. HackProduct wordmark watermark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 1600x1600. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.

assets.alt: Hatch examining a three-step flow diagram showing Base44's describe-generate-iterate mechanism.
assets.caption: Hatch examining a three-step flow diagram showing Base44's describe-generate-iterate mechanism.
assets.prompt: Base44 and the No-Code Bet | failure-mechanism: Hatch in thinking pose, looking at a three-step flow diagram. Step 1: "Describe your app in plain language." Step 2: "Base44 generates database, logic, and UI." Step 3: "Iterate by describing changes." Each step has a simple icon. The overall shape suggests a conversation, not a build process. Cream background. HackProduct wordmark watermark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 1800x1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression.
